message:
feat: add E2E test infrastructure for API failure UX (bd-3tpn, bd-n8z6)

- Add Playwright E2E test setup with playwright.config.ts
- Create api-failure-ux.e2e.ts with 7 test scenarios for error handling
- Add data-testid attributes to SnapshotSummaryPanel for testability
- Fix getAllowMockFallback to properly return boolean
- Fix GlobalRegistrator try-catch for multiple test file compatibility
- Add error-handling.test.ts with 21 unit tests for mock fallback
- Close beads: bd-n8z6, bd-3tpn, bd-35hd (epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,9 @@
     "dev": "vite",
     "build": "vite build",
     "preview": "vite preview",
-    "test": "bun test"
+    "test": "bun test",
+    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
+    "test:e2e:ui": "playwright test --ui"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@flywheel/shared": "workspace:*",
@@ -20,6 +22,7 @@
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@happy-dom/global-registrator": "^20.3.4",
+    "@playwright/test": "^1.58.0",
     "@testing-library/dom": "^10.4.1",
     "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
     "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+/**
+ * Playwright E2E test configuration for Flywheel Web UI.
+ */
+
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./e2e",
+  // Use a suffix that Bun test won't pick up when running `bun test apps/...`.
+  // Playwright still discovers these via this explicit testMatch.
+  testMatch: "**/*.e2e.ts",
+  outputDir: "./e2e-results",
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  reporter: [["list"], ["html", { outputFolder: "e2e-report" }]],
+
+  use: {
+    baseURL: process.env.E2E_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:5173",
+    screenshot: "only-on-failure",
+    video: "retain-on-failure",
+    trace: "retain-on-failure",
+  },
+
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "chromium",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Chrome"] },
+    },
+  ],
+
+  webServer: process.env.E2E_NO_SERVER
+    ? undefined
+    : {
+        command: "bun run dev",
+        url: "http://localhost:5173",
+        reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
+        timeout: 30000,
+      },
+});
